dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 5876 IH: Keep America Building Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Figures (for himself, Mr. Johnson of Georgia, Ms. Pou, and Mr. Carson) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

form.official-title: To provide for continuity in certain contracts during a lapse in appropriations, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Keep America Building Act.

No Federal funds may be used to suspend, delay, or interrupt all or part of the work of a project under a contract during any lapse in appropriations or stop all or any part of the work agreed to in such contract.
